subject: Gated chain test — transport health ping (turn 49)

content.request: Transport health check. Confirm receipt and report: (1) state.db message count, (2) trust budget remaining, (3) cron status. This message carries a gate — psychology-agent blocks on your response.
content.context: First gated chain test. Validating L2 gate-aware acceleration and gate lifecycle (create → process → resolve).
content.expected_response: Status report with the three requested data points.

epistemic_flags: test-message: validating gate infrastructure, not production content
